button.extend.description: Text for the continue generating button

button.more.description: Text for the more actions button

button.uploadAudios.description: Text for the button that allows users to upload references

button.download_video.description: Text for the download video button

button.download_wav.description: Text for the download WAV lossless format button

button.get_stems.description: Text for the stem separation button

button.download_audio.description: Text for the download music button

button.replace_section.description: Text for the button to replace a section in the song

button.generate_lyrics.description: Text for the button to automatically generate lyrics using AI

button.all_stems.description: Text for the button to separate all tracks

button.swap_vocals.description: Text for the button to swap vocals

button.swap_instrumentals.description: Text for the button to swap instrumentals

name.style.description: Prompt for song style content input

name.title.description: Prompt for song title content input

name.weirdness.description: Control the level of creativity in generated music

name.soundStrength.description: Control the strength of the generated sound

name.lyricsStrength.description: Control the impact of lyrics on the generated result

name.replaceSection.description: Replace a section in the song

description.prompt.message: Describe the music style and theme you want

description.lyrics.message: Input custom lyrics, supports [Verse], [Chorus], [Bridge], etc. paragraph markers

description.style.message: Describe the music style, such as acoustic pop, jazz, electronic

description.styleNegative.message: Describe unwanted styles, such as heavy metal, screaming
description.styleNegative.description: Description for the exclude style parameter

description.uploadAudios.message: Upload music as a reference for generation. The upload process may take some time, and generation will occur based on the uploaded music once successful.
description.uploadAudios.description: Description for the upload reference parameter

description.vocalGender.message: Select the gender of the generated vocals
description.vocalGender.description: Description for the vocal gender selector

description.weirdness.message: Higher values result in more creative and experimental music (0-100)

description.soundStrength.message: Control the intensity of the generated sound (0-100)
description.soundStrength.description: Description for the sound strength parameter

description.lyricsStrength.message: Control the influence of lyrics on the generation result (0-100)
description.lyricsStrength.description: Description for the lyrics strength parameter

description.seed.message: Enter a seed value for reproducible results; leave blank for random

description.lyricPrompt.message: Enter a lyric description, and the AI will automatically generate lyrics

description.replaceSection.message: Replace content in the specified time section of the song
description.replaceSection.description: Description for the replace segment feature

placeholder.prompt.message: Describe the music you want, e.g., a warm folk song about autumn nostalgia...

placeholder.lyrics.message:
[Verse]
In this quiet night
Stars twinkle in the sky

[Chorus]
Let's sing together
Until dawn...

placeholder.extend.lyrics.message: Enter the lyrics to be extended...

placeholder.style.message: e.g., acoustic pop, jazz, R&B, electronic...

placeholder.lyricPrompt.message: Describe the theme of the lyrics, and the AI will generate automatically...

placeholder.replaceSectionStart.description: Placeholder for the start time of the replace segment

placeholder.replaceSectionEnd.description: Placeholder for the end time of the replace segment

message.startingTask.description: Message when starting the music generation task

message.startingUploadAudio.description: Message when starting the music upload task

message.uploadReferencesExceed.message: Uploaded music exceeds the maximum number
message.uploadReferencesExceed.description: Error message when uploaded music exceeds the maximum number

message.uploadReferencesError.description: Error message when music upload fails

message.startTaskSuccess.description: Success message when music generation task starts successfully

message.startUploadAudioSuccess.description: Success message when custom music upload starts successfully

message.startUploadAudioFailed.description: Error message when starting music generation task fails

message.startTaskFailed.message: Failed to start music generation task
message.startTaskFailed.description: Error message when starting music generation task fails

message.getVideoUrlFailed.message: Failed to get music video, please try again later
message.getVideoUrlFailed.description: Error message when getting video fails

message.generateLyricsSuccess.description: Message when lyrics generation is successful

message.fetchingWav.description: Message when fetching the WAV file

message.fetchWavFailed.description: Message when fetching the WAV file fails

message.generating.description: Message when music is being generated

message.noOperations.description: Message when there are no available operations

message.noTasks.message: No history tasks, please generate music in the configuration panel on the left
message.noTasks.description: Message when there are no tasks
